recommendations.title: Aftershock
recommendations.overview: Mayhem and death follow when an earthquake traps a group of tourists in a Chilean town.

recommendations.title: Letter Never Sent
recommendations.overview: Four geologists are searching for diamonds in the wilderness of Siberia. After a long and tiresome journey they manage to find their luck and put the diamond mine on the map. The map must be delivered back to Moscow. But on the day of their departure

recommendations.title: Hatchet
recommendations.overview: When a group of tourists on a New Orleans haunted swamp tour find themselves stranded in the wilderness, their evening of fun and spooks turns into a horrific nightmare.

recommendations.title: Monkey Kingdom
recommendations.overview: A newborn monkey and its mother struggle to survive within the competitive social hierarchy of the Temple Troop, a dynamic group of monkeys who live in ancient ruins found deep in the storied jungles of South Asia.

recommendations.title: Temple Grandin
recommendations.overview: A biopic of Temple Grandin, an autistic American who has become one of the leading scientists in humane livestock handling.

recommendations.title: Return
recommendations.overview: A girl is at school. Suddenly it's as if she can't breathe. As she runs down the stairs we follow her into her mind. It takes us deep into dark woods.

recommendations.title: The Conspiracy
recommendations.overview: A documentary about conspiracy theories takes a horrific turn after the filmmakers uncover an ancient and dangerous secret society.

recommendations.title: 2012 Doomsday
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Horror, Science Fiction, Thriller
recommendations.overview: On December 21, 2012 four strangers on a journey of faith are drawn to an ancient temple in the heart of Mexico. For the Mayans it is the last recorded day. For NASA scientists it is a cataclysmic polar shift. For the rest of us, it is Doomsday.

recommendations.title: Godzilla, Mothra and King Ghidorah: Giant Monsters All-Out Attack
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Horror, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Godzilla has become a distant memory for Japan when the destruction of a US submarine raises alarms for Admiral Tachibana. His estranged daughter Yuri investigates the legend of the guardian monsters, who must rise to protect Japan against the vengef

recommendations.title: The Kindred
recommendations.overview: After her father’s suicide, a young mother investigates what led to his death. But when she is haunted by spirits and unearths an unsolved mystery from 30 years ago, she discovers a dark family history that could prove deadly for her child.
